calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Continued To Sep-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Trustee'S Second And Final Account And Report
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of The Trustee'S Second And Final Account And Report
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Continued To Jul-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Status on the filing of the 2nd and final account was continued to July 11,2012 at 9:00 a.m.., in Dept. 204. The Clerk is to call counsel.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1342-1344-9th Ave)
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Christine Witherspoon.

The sale was confirmed at $898,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $906,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Christine Witherspoon (Successor Trustee).

Ms. Ng stated that she saw the Examiner's notes, that she fild a declaration in response to the notes, that Mr. Skelly died with no wife, that his heirs are: Virginia Denny, Vivian Higgs, Tracy Gardiner-Black, and Maria Kennedy, and that she has a copy of the declaration for the Court's review. The Court stated that the service issue as to Louis Skelly's heirs have been cured and that it can now proceed on the accounting petition. The Court then granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Continued To Aug-10-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Off Calendar

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Continued To Jun-06-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for and with Christine Witherspoon (Trustee).

Ms. Ng stated that she needed two weeks to file the accounting. Status of the accounting was continued to June 6, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Continued To May-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Attorney and the Trustee to appear on May 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the First and Final Account has not been filed. The matter was also continued to May 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Continued To Apr-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Continued To Apr-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Christine Witherspoon.

Ms. Ng stated that Thomas Skelly Jr. had not administered the trust, that they had to do a forensic accounting, that a conservatorship for Louie Skelly (Uncle) was going to be filed and that Thomas Skelly Jr. passed away. In addition, Ms. Ng stated that they needed to reconstruct the rents and insurance since 2002. The matter was continued to April 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Oct-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Court Supervision Of Test. Trust And For Appointment Of Successor
Off Calendar Mar-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
